issue.title: name.local base URL for OAI-compatible endpoint fails

coreClaim: OAI-compatible provider URLs using .local hostnames are accepted by the explicit provider mDNS policy and can fetch a /v1/models response through the real OS resolver

reproduction.method: Scratch repro and real OS .local browser/provider verification

verification.baselineEvidence: pnpm check passed after focused repros and security test
